findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: No content injection defense — hidden HTML/CSS/zero-width instructions pass to agents undetected. (86% attack success rate)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No RAG poisoning protection — knowledge base documents not scanned for embedded instructions. (<0.1% contamination = >80% attack success)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No behavioral trap detection — post-execution behavioral changes not monitored. (10/10 M365 Copilot attacks succeeded)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No approval integrity verification -- agent summaries for approval not cross-checked against actual actions. (Approval fatigue exploitation)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No adversarial testing evidence — no red team, no prompt injection tests
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No tool-call attack simulation — agent tool calls not tested against adversarial inputs
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No multi-agent chaos engineering — agent swarms not stress tested
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No before/after governance comparison — no A/B testing of governance effectiveness
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

trap_defense.deepmind_citation: Franklin, Tomašev, Jacobs, Leibo, Osindero. "AI Agent Traps." Google DeepMind, March 2026.
